title: Danish pension fund excludes SpaceX citing governance and valuation
summary: Danish pension fund Akademikerpension has excluded SpaceX from its investments. The fund cited concerns over the company's governance structure and its high valuation. Akademikerpension believes SpaceX's stock is overvalued, with a market indication of over $1.8 trillion.
